examples.title: Horizontal incidents
examples.description: A horizontal grouped bar chart for incident counts by severity.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { BarChart } from '@lostgradient/cinder/bar-chart';

  const data = [
    { severity: 'Critical escalation', current: 8, previous: 10 },
    { severity: 'High', current: 18, previous: 22 },
    { severity: 'Medium', current: 41, previous: 39 },
  ];
  const series = [
    { id: 'current', label: 'Current', valueKey: 'current' },
    { id: 'previous', label: 'Previous', valueKey: 'previous' },
  ];
</script>

<BarChart
  label="Incidents by severity"
  {data}
  categoryKey="severity"
  {series}
  orientation="horizontal"
/>

examples.title: Grouped plan usage
examples.description: A vertical grouped bar chart comparing usage by plan.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { BarChart } from '@lostgradient/cinder/bar-chart';

  const data = [
    { plan: 'Starter', active: 120, invited: 42 },
    { plan: 'Team', active: 210, invited: 76 },
    { plan: 'Enterprise', active: 92, invited: 28 },
  ];
  const series = [
    { id: 'active', label: 'Active users', valueKey: 'active' },
    { id: 'invited', label: 'Invited users', valueKey: 'invited' },
  ];
</script>

<BarChart label="Plan usage" {data} categoryKey="plan" {series} dataTableVisibility="visible" />

examples.title: Stacked ticket volume
examples.description: A vertical stacked bar chart showing open and resolved support tickets.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { BarChart } from '@lostgradient/cinder/bar-chart';

  const data = [
    { week: 'Week 1', open: 34, resolved: 70 },
    { week: 'Week 2', open: 29, resolved: 84 },
    { week: 'Week 3', open: 41, resolved: 78 },
  ];
  const series = [
    { id: 'open', label: 'Open', valueKey: 'open' },
    { id: 'resolved', label: 'Resolved', valueKey: 'resolved' },
  ];
</script>

<BarChart label="Support ticket volume" {data} categoryKey="week" {series} mode="stacked" />
